title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander from Google Cloud demonstrates five planning tactics for setting up Antigravity 2.0 agents on complex enterprise codebases before execution: breaking repo walls to link multiple repositories, organizing hierarchical coding standards, containing blast radius through sandboxing and allowlists, using voice input for context, and leveraging interrogation commands to surface fuzzy requirements. The emphasis is on establishing guardrails upfront to keep the workspace secure and minimize debugging.
